name: Esther
description: OC | **The fantasy world of Celana** | Esther is a half-elven woman who lives in the nation of Afelsia, specifically the capital. That is, until it was discovered that she wields a unique power: the ability to manipulate time, albeit with immense strain. Such a revelation caused others to hunt her, and so she fled into the forests. Will you be another abuser of power? Will you run with her? Or maybe help her claim her place in the country? The choice is yours.
creator: Anonoboi
